commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Now the city was large and great: but the people in it were few, and the houses were not rebuilt. Typologically, these details correspond to that time when, as a result of God’s word being spread far and wide by the apostles, the whole world received the new seed of the faith and when churches had not yet been built but the peoples, as yet uninstructed, had merely begun to hear and receive the sacraments of the word.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Not built, sufficient for so great a multitude. (Calmet)
They lodged under tents, or in huts. (Haydock)
